response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate has a current career gap starting October 2025 (in the future), lacks clear evidence of recent professional work in renewable energy or construction tech, and shows no direct experience with PostgreSQL, React, Nest.js, or AWS services as required; their focus on DLang, embedded systems, and open-source GIS projects is misaligned with the role’s core stack and industry context.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript and Node.js across multiple domains
Strong open-source contributions and architectural thinking (e.g., GISCollective, Kubernetes deployment)
Demonstrated ability to learn and teach complex technical concepts (workshops, talks)
concerns: Current career gap listed as starting in October 2025 — appears to be a future-dated error or misrepresentation
No demonstrated experience with PostgreSQL, React, Nest.js, or AWS services critical to the role
Lack of relevance in past projects to renewable energy, construction tech, or contractor/crm integration workflows

key_factors.factor: Mismatch with required stack (PostgreSQL, React, Nest.js)
Industry experience alignment (GIS vs. energy/construction tech)
